content: Verify the root causes of NDX is falling down. Are we in bear market?

args.thought: Plan the NDX analysis: 1) Check memory for stored market context/user views, 2) Get current NDX price data and historical levels to determine if we're in bear market territory (-20% from highs), 3) Search for catalysts driving the decline (macro, earnings, Fed policy, sector rotation), 4) Analyze breadth/technical indicators, 5) Form verdict on bear market status and root causes.

args.thought: Calculate drawdown from 52-week high: Current ~23,150-23,586 vs 52-week high 26,182. Drawdown = (26,182 - 23,300) / 26,182 ≈ 11%. This is NOT bear market territory (-20%). Need to search for root causes of the decline - likely macro/Fed policy, AI bubble concerns, earnings disappointments, sector rotation.
